rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
rule_metadata.title: Common Payload and C2 URI Paths

rules.rule_text:
title: Common Payload and C2 URI Paths
id: 34800aac-8970-47cd-abd9-524dfee7d6c7
description: The rule detectes commonly used payload and C2 URI paths lacking properties
  of normal web surf
status: experimental
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
references:
- https://go.recordedfuture.com/hubfs/reports/cta-2023-0727-1.pdf
- https://www.welivesecurity.com/2022/09/30/amazon-themed-campaigns-lazarus-netherlands-belgium/
- https://labs.withsecure.com/content/dam/labs/docs/WithSecure-Lazarus-No-Pineapple-Threat-Intelligence-Report-2023.pdf
- https://asec.ahnlab.com/ko/53832/
- https://medium.com/checkmarx-security/lazarus-group-launches-first-open-source-supply-chain-attacks-targeting-crypto-sector-cabc626e404e
- https://blog.eclecticiq.com/german-embassy-lure-likely-part-of-campaign-against-nato-aligned-ministries-of-foreign-affairs
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/lazarus-quiterat/
- https://www.ncsc.gov.uk/static-assets/documents/malware-analysis-reports/infamous-chisel/NCSC-MAR-Infamous-Chisel.pdf
- https://asec.ahnlab.com/ko/56654/
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2023/10/18/multiple-north-korean-threat-actors-exploiting-the-teamcity-cve-2023-42793-vulnerability/
- https://cert.gov.ua/article/5213167
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2023/11/22/diamond-sleet-supply-chain-compromise-distributes-a-modified-cyberlink-installer/
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/unc4990-evolution-usb-malware
- https://x.com/cyb3rops/status/1813087660136931758
date: '2023-08-01'
modified: '2024-02-01'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection_1_bluebravo:
    c-uri|endswith:
    - /form.php
    - /submit.php
    - /dashboard.php
    - /information.php
    - /contact.php
  selection_2_lazarus:
    c-uri|endswith:
    - /feedback.php
    - /maps.php
    - /img.asp
    - /brow.php
    - /edit.asp
    - /bottom.asp
    - /logout.asp
    - /cache.php
    - /checkupdate.php
    - /logs.php
    - /tmp/log.php
    - /tmp/logs.php
    - /com.php
    - /about.php
    - /addin.php
    - /wids.php
    - _common.asp
  selection_3_apt29:
    c-uri|endswith:
    - /idx.php
  selection_4_sandworm:
    cs-method: POST
    c-uri|endswith:
    - /server.php
  selection_5_apt28:
    c-uri:
    - /owa/scripts/logon.aspx
    - /outlook/api/logoff.aspx
    - /MICROSOFT.EXCHANGE.MAILBOXREPLICATIONSERVICE.PROXYSERVICE/RPCWITHCERT/SYNC
  selection_6_unc4990:
    c-uri|endswith: /updater.php
  empty_referer:
    cs-referer: ''
  internal_src:
  - vendor: Zscaler
  - src_ip|cidr:
    - 10.0.0.0/8
    - 192.168.0.0/16
    - 172.16.0.0/12
  filter:
  - cs-host:
    - www.facebook.com
    - update.utorrent.com
    - hits.informer.com
    - www.advanced-ip-scanner.com
    - www.4t-niaggara.com
  - c-uri-query|startswith:
    - rqst=track
  - dest_ip|cidr:
    - 10.0.0.0/8
    - 192.168.0.0/16
    - 172.16.0.0/12
  - cs-method: ''
  - c-uri|contains: /-/post/https
  condition: 1 of selection* and empty_referer and internal_src and not filter
falsepositives:
- A certain amount of False-Positives exists with legitimate but odd traffic, take
  these alerts as an indicator and investigate the traffic and the surrounding events
  further for malicious indicators.
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial_access
- attack.command_and_control
